title: Retain Immigration Attorney
description: Professional legal guidance becomes non-optional when policy uncertainty rises.
items: Consult immigration attorney - not optional at this stage
Understand your specific options: H1B extension, change of status, O-1, EB-1, L-1
Ask attorney: what is my worst-case timeline and what do I do at each step?
Understand your employer's posture - will they fight for you or not?
